economic_notes: Band operates multiple partnerships including trucking, gravel pit, natural resources, oil and gas pipeline services, retail store and fuel outlet. GBEs include Knucwentwecw Development Corporation, Big Sky Station Ltd., and Skeetchestn Natural Resources Corporation. Five government partnerships accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Audit is qualified on two grounds: (1) CMHC social housing amortization policy does not comply with PSAS; (2) certain GBEs/partnerships not prepared under IFRS as required by PSAS. Comparative 2021 figures restated per Note 24 with prior period adjustments. Five partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Three GBEs also on modified equity basis. Large deferred revenue increase of $4.28M due to Province of BC Memorandum of Agreement contributions for projects not yet commenced. Housing and Capital Projects expenses budget was $5.1M but actual was only $690K suggesting major capital projects deferred. Natural Resources department moved to partnership structure during year with net book value of assets consolidated from former business entities of $618,821.
